data.title: The correlation between the Japanese yen and the Topix index has turned positive for the first time since 2005.
data.description: The Kobeissi Letter, in an article published on the X platform, stated that the Japanese market is making history, with the correlation between the yen and the Topix stock index turning positive for the first time since 2005. This means that the yen and Japanese stocks are rising in tandem. Over the past year, the yen has appreciated by 1% against the US dollar, while the Topix index has risen by 38%. Historically, this pattern typically occurs in long-term bull markets, such as Japan from 1982 to 1990, Germany from 1985 to 1995, and China from 2000 to 2008.

data.title: Kraken responded to Trump's "Trump Accounts" initiative by providing funding for Trump accounts set up for newborns in Wyoming.
data.description: Cryptocurrency exchange Kraken has become the latest company to respond to President Donald Trump's call to support his "Trump Accounts," a savings plan for U.S. children under 18. Wyoming Senator Cynthia Loomis first announced the initiative on Monday, stating that Kraken will fund all Trump Accounts set up for newborns in Wyoming. Kraken said it chose Wyoming because of the state's "responsible" approach to cryptocurrency regulation.

data.title: DeFiLlama: Over 60 chains with monthly fees under $1,000
data.description: According to DeFiLlama data, there are over 60 chains with monthly fees of less than $1,000, many of which have received substantial funding or endorsement from well-known institutions. For example, Stroy's fees in the past 30 days were $707, Corn's were $424, and Mode's were $400.

data.title: Romania Maintains High Interest Rates Amid Inflation Concerns
data.description: Romania is set to maintain one of the highest interest rates in the European Union, prioritizing the battle against rising inflation over alleviating pressure on its recession-affected economy. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the country's decision to focus on inflation control despite economic challenges. This approach reflects Romania's commitment to stabilizing prices, even as its economy faces downturns. The decision underscores the balancing act between economic growth and inflation management, a challenge faced by many EU nations.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Copper and Aluminum Prices Decline Amid Rising Stockpiles and Tariff Concerns
data.description: Copper and aluminum prices experienced a decline due to increasing stockpiles and ongoing tariff uncertainties. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the sentiment in the market was affected as many Asian traders were absent from their desks during the Lunar New Year holiday. The accumulation of copper inventories has contributed to the downward pressure on prices, while concerns over tariffs continue to create uncertainty in the market. The absence of traders during the holiday period has further impacted trading activities, leading to subdued market conditions.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Indian Prime Minister Modi Welcomes French President Macron to Strengthen Bilateral Relations
data.description: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi has extended a warm welcome to French President Emmanuel Macron during his visit to India. According to Jin10, Modi expressed his hope to elevate the bilateral relationship between the two nations to new heights. He emphasized that their discussions are expected to further enhance cooperation across various sectors and contribute to global progress.

data.title: STOCKS | Analysis of Dow Jones Performance Under Trump Administration
data.description: Pam Bondi's comments on the stock market have raised questions, but insights from John Authers provide clarity. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the Dow Jones Industrial Average's performance during U.S. President Donald Trump's tenure. The analysis delves into market trends and economic factors influencing the stock index under Trump's leadership. Authers' examination offers a detailed look at how the Dow has responded to various policies and global events during this period. The report underscores the complexities of market dynamics and the impact of presidential decisions on financial markets.

data.title: Brother Machi sold some altcoins to go long on BTC, ETH, and HYPE again.
data.description: According to HyperInsight monitoring, Huang Licheng's ("Maji Dage") address sold some ETH and some altcoins from his wallet, and subsequently increased his holdings of BTC, ETH, and HYPE on Hyperliquid. His current holdings are as follows: • 25x long position of 6,200 ETH, opening price $2006.88, liquidation price $1847.69; • 40x long position of 25 BTC, opening price $68,645.90, liquidation price $33,872.44; • 10x long position of 55,000 HYPE, opening price $31.09, liquidation price $14.44.

data.title: Ignition Gains Most Influential Followers on X
data.description:
Ignition, a liquidity staking infrastructure, has emerged as the project with the most new influential followers on X over the past week. According to ChainCatcher, data from the Web3 asset data platform RootData X indicates that prominent figures such as IcoBeast.eth (@icobeast), 2Lambroz (@2lambro), and 小捕手 CHAOS (@iamyourchaos) have recently started following the project.

Other projects that have attracted a significant number of influential followers on X include predict.fun and Echelon Market.

data.title: Philippine digital bank Maya is exploring an IPO in the United States.
data.description: Philippine digital bank Maya is exploring an initial public offering (IPO) in the United States, planning to raise up to $1 billion. The company is currently working with advisors to advance the deal. Maya holds a digital banking license issued by the Central Bank of the Philippines and offers savings accounts, consumer loans, payments, and merchant services through its app. In addition to its core banking business, Maya also offers in-app cryptocurrency trading services under a regulated virtual asset service provider framework. Choosing a US listing could provide Maya with a deeper capital pool and a broader institutional investor base. Local observers say investors will weigh the company's banking fundamentals against its crypto compliance.

data.title: Foreign media: Musk has an nearly 80% chance of becoming the world's first trillionaire this year.
data.description: According to the latest Forbes billionaires list, Tesla CEO Elon Musk's personal wealth is approaching $850 billion. Furthermore, according to predictions from the Kalshi platform, he has a 78% chance of becoming the world's first trillionaire this year. Watcher.Guru, writing on the X platform, stated that Musk claims to have less than $850 million in cash, representing only 0.1% of his net worth.
